clues.clue: Write \(3^4\) as a whole number.
Simplify the surd \(\sqrt{50}\).
Factorise \(x^2 + 7x + 12\).
Give the formula that solves $$ax^2 + bx + c = 0$$
State the pH of a neutral solution.
Write the ion formed when sodium loses one electron.
Give the electron shell arrangement of chlorine, \(Z = 17\).
Balance: \(H_2 + O_2 \rightarrow H_2O\).
Balance this combustion: $$CH_4 + O_2 \rightarrow CO_2 + H_2O$$
State the formula for average speed from distance \(d\) and time \(t\).
State Newton's second law as an equation.
Find the force on a \(10\,\text{kg}\) mass accelerating at \(3\,\text{m/s}^2\).
State the formula for kinetic energy.
Find the kinetic energy of a \(2\,\text{kg}\) ball moving at \(3\,\text{m/s}\).
Name the cell structure that contains DNA and controls the cell.
In DNA, base \(A\) always pairs with which base?
A cross \(Bb \times Bb\) gives what ratio of dominant to recessive?
State the magnification formula using image and actual size.
Complete this respiration equation: $$C_6H_{12}O_6 + 6O_2 \rightarrow\ ?$$
State the base of the binary number system.
State the number of bits in one byte.
Convert \(1101_2\) to decimal.
Convert the hexadecimal \(2A_{16}\) to decimal.
Evaluate \(\overline{1 \land 1}\) (NAND).
